title: Powerloom v2 common definitions
description: Shared $defs referenced by every v2 primitive + stdlib derivation. v2.0.0 adds scope_ref, primitive_ref, and compose-expression typing primitives.

api_version.description: v2.0.0 fixes the apiVersion to a single canonical form. No monorepo backward-compat alias.

resource_name.description: DNS-compatible slug. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; must start with alnum; 1–63 chars.

scope_ref.description: Dotted-path reference to a Scope (e.g., 'home.research.infra'). Resolves within the containing OU.

primitive_ref.description: Name of one of the six v2 root primitives. Used in compose-expression slot tags.

kind_ref.description: Qualified kind name: either a stdlib kind (e.g. 'Agent', 'Workflow') or a user-composed kind in a namespace (e.g. 'legal.ContractClause').

compose_slot.description: A single slot in a compose-expression. References one primitive (or extends a stdlib kind), optionally tagged with a role and populated with field values.

role.description: Optional role tag disambiguates multiple slots of the same primitive type (e.g., two Policy slots with roles 'runtime' and 'access').

fields.description: Field values for this slot. Validated against the referenced primitive or kind schema.
